Achaea Help Files
Achaea has hundreds of help files to you learn about Achaea. This is a copy of the in-game help file structure. HELP in-game will show you this same menu.
Help:
[
Return to Help Index
]
8.8 Customisable House Positions
Aside from the
House
Leader, each House has up to
6
formal, customisable
House positions. One of these is always the Head of
Newcomers
. See
HELP NEWCOMERHEAD
. The
other
five are fully customisable depending on the
need and desires of the House.
The House Leader sets up the House positions and invests them with powers
necessary to carry out their work. He or she then appoints House members to
the positions. There may be more than one House
member
appointed to each
position, except the Head of Newcomers.
Position holders can also appoint
aides
, which they can then divest with
some of their own powers. This flexibility allows for a great deal of
individuality and
customisation
in the structure of each House.
See also:
HELP
8
Achaea is developed and published by
Iron Realms Entertainment.
